name: Central Park
description: Come play pickleball at Central Park in Hillsboro, IL! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Fusion Fitness and Aquatics Center
description: Fusion Fitness and Aquatics Center is a place to play pickleball in Hillsboro, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Litchfield Community Center
description: Litchfield Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Litchfield, IL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Litchfield Tennis Courts
description: Litchfield Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Litchfield, IL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
